options.label: 北美
options.copyDirective: Target North American buyers; use US units where natural, confident professional tone, emphasize compliance (FDA/UL) and reliable logistics.

options.label: 西欧
options.copyDirective: Target Western European buyers; emphasize CE/REACH compliance, sustainability and precise, understated professionalism.

options.label: 中东
options.copyDirective: Target Middle East buyers; emphasize Halal where relevant, large-volume supply, relationship and reliability.

options.label: 东南亚
options.copyDirective: Target Southeast Asian buyers; emphasize competitive pricing, flexible MOQ and fast regional shipping.

options.label: 拉美
options.copyDirective: Target Latin American buyers; emphasize value, supply stability and Spanish/Portuguese-market familiarity.

options.label: 通用
options.copyDirective: Target a global B2B audience; keep claims market-neutral and broadly credible.

options.label: 技术专业
options.copyDirective: Positioning: technical/professional. Precise, specification-aware language; restrained adjectives.

options.label: 高端品质
options.copyDirective: Positioning: premium quality. Polished, confident, quality-led language; refined tone.

options.label: 性价比走量
options.copyDirective: Positioning: value/volume. Emphasize cost-efficiency, capacity and supply reliability.

options.label: 进口商/分销商
options.copyDirective: Buyer: importer/distributor — cares about supply stability, lead time, documentation and margins.

options.label: 品牌方/制造商
options.copyDirective: Buyer: brand/manufacturer — cares about quality consistency, OEM/customization and compliance.

options.label: 终端工厂
options.copyDirective: Buyer: end-factory — cares about technical fit, throughput and after-sales support.

options.label: 贸易商
options.copyDirective: Buyer: trader — cares about price, MOQ flexibility and quick turnaround.

options.label: 工厂实力
options.copyDirective: Lead trust with factory strength: capacity, production lines, years in business.

options.label: 认证合规
options.copyDirective: Lead trust with compliance: certifications, documentation, audit-readiness.

options.label: 定制能力
options.copyDirective: Lead trust with customization: OEM/ODM, flexible specs and packaging.

options.label: 价格供应链
options.copyDirective: Lead trust with price & supply chain: competitive pricing and stable supply.

options.label: 显式报价
options.copyDirective: Price stance: may reference pricing/tiers; CTA invites a quote with pricing.

options.label: 询盘藏价
options.copyDirective: Price stance: do not state prices; CTA drives inquiry/quote requests.

options.label: 样品优先
options.copyDirective: Price stance: lead with free/low-cost samples; CTA offers a sample request.

options.label: 纯色棚拍
options.l2Block: clean solid-color seamless studio backdrop, professional product photography, neutral surface

options.label: 渐变背景
options.l2Block: smooth gradient studio background, soft falloff, modern catalog look

options.label: 极简场景
options.l2Block: minimal styled scene with a single clean surface and subtle context, uncluttered

options.label: 工业现场
options.l2Block: industrial setting, clean factory floor or workshop context, professional and rugged

options.label: 柔光棚拍
options.l2Block: soft diffused studio lighting, gentle gradient shadows, high-key, no harsh reflections

options.label: 硬光质感
options.l2Block: directional hard light emphasizing surface texture and material detail, defined shadows

options.label: 自然光
options.l2Block: natural daylight, soft realistic shadows, true-to-life color rendering

options.label: 正面平视
options.l2Block: straight-on frontal eye-level composition, centered subject, balanced framing

options.label: 45°俯视
options.l2Block: 45-degree elevated three-quarter angle showing form and depth

options.label: 居中特写
options.l2Block: centered close-up composition emphasizing detail and texture

options.label: 实验室
options.l2Block: modern laboratory / quality-control environment, clean and clinical, technicians working, no readable text

options.label: 车间产线
options.l2Block: modern production line / factory floor, machinery and process, professional industrial scene, no readable text

options.label: 仓储物流
options.l2Block: organized warehouse with stacked goods and logistics activity, scale and supply capability, no readable text

options.label: 应用场景
options.l2Block: real-world application scene showing the product category in use, contextual and aspirational, no readable text

options.label: 抽象品牌
options.l2Block: abstract premium brand backdrop, clean geometric or gradient composition, no readable text

options.label: 强保真
options.l2Block: Preserve the real product from the customer photo with maximum fidelity; only change lighting, background and crop. Do not alter the product's shape, label or proportions.

options.label: 中
options.l2Block: Keep the product recognizable and true to the customer photo while restyling the presentation, background and layout.

options.label: 弱（接近重绘）
options.l2Block: Use the customer photo only as a loose guide for the overall form; re-render the presentation cleanly.

options.label: 冷静专业
options.l2Block: cool professional palette, blues and neutral grays, controlled and trustworthy

options.label: 活力暖色
options.l2Block: warm vivid palette, inviting and energetic tones

options.label: 高端暗调
options.l2Block: dark premium palette, deep tones with selective highlights, luxury feel

options.label: 洁净高明度
options.l2Block: clean bright high-key palette, white and light neutrals, hygienic and clear

options.label: 极简纯净
options.l2Block: minimal pure background, no distractions

options.label: 轻纹理
options.l2Block: subtle background texture, gentle depth without distraction

options.label: 场景化
options.l2Block: contextual scene background relevant to the product category

options.label: 无陪衬
options.l2Block: no additional props, product only

options.label: 行业道具
options.l2Block: relevant industry props that reinforce the category context

options.label: 包装展示
options.l2Block: show the product alongside its packaging

options.label: 品质认证
options.copyDirective: Emphasize quality & certifications.

options.label: 价格MOQ
options.copyDirective: Emphasize competitive price and flexible MOQ.

options.label: 定制OEM
options.copyDirective: Emphasize OEM/ODM customization capability.

options.label: 交期物流
options.copyDirective: Emphasize lead time and logistics reliability.

options.label: 产能规模
options.copyDirective: Emphasize production capacity and scale.

options.label: 克制专业
options.copyDirective: Tone: restrained and professional. Minimal adjectives, no exclamation marks, no promotional language.

options.label: 中性
options.copyDirective: Tone: neutral and clear. Balanced, informative.

options.label: 热情促销
options.copyDirective: Tone: warm and promotional. Confident, persuasive, energetic (still credible).

options.label: 精简
options.copyDirective: Richness: lean — only required fields plus at most one optional module.

options.label: 标准
options.copyDirective: Richness: standard — a balanced set of modules with moderate item counts.

options.label: 丰满
options.copyDirective: Richness: rich — populate all modules available for the template, with full item counts.

options.label: 平和
options.copyDirective: CTA urgency: calm and inviting.

options.label: 中等
options.copyDirective: CTA urgency: moderate, encourage timely inquiry.

options.label: 强催促
options.copyDirective: CTA urgency: strong, create a sense of timeliness (without false scarcity).

options.label: 数据型
options.copyDirective: Social proof: data-led (stats/numbers).

options.label: 口碑型
options.copyDirective: Social proof: testimonials/word-of-mouth.

options.label: 资质型
options.copyDirective: Social proof: credentials/certifications.
